mapper.select: SELECT lba.id AS accountId, im.company_code AS bankCode, im.company_name AS bankName, lba.account_name AS accountName, lba.account_type AS accountType, lba.balance AS balance, lba.currency AS currency, lba.is_dormant AS isDormant, lba.is_verified AS isVerified FROM linked_bank_accounts lba JOIN linked_institutions li ON li.id = lba.institution_id JOIN institution_master im ON im.id = li.institution_master_id WHERE lba.user_id = #{userId} AND lba.closed_at IS NULL ORDER BY im.sort_order ASC, lba.id ASC
